faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about Unaï AI Storytelling.
faq.a1: Unaï AI Storytelling is an innovative app that uses artificial intelligence to create personalized, magical stories for children. You can customize characters, settings, and themes to create unique reading experiences.
faq.q2: How do I generate a story?
faq.a2: Navigate to the 'Generate' tab, enter your child's name and age, choose a genre, and add any special characters or moral lessons you'd like to include. Tap 'Generate' and watch the magic happen!
faq.q3: Can I listen to the stories?
faq.a3: Yes! Every story generated includes high-quality AI narration. You can play, pause, and control the playback speed in the story viewer.
faq.a4: Absolutely. You can download your favorite stories to your device. Once downloaded, they will be available in your 'Offline Stories' section even without an internet connection.
faq.a5: We currently support English, Arabic, and French. The app also features full RTL (Right-to-Left) support for Arabic users.
faq.a6: Yes, safety is our priority. Our AI is specifically trained to generate age-appropriate, positive, and educational content for children.
faq.q7: How do I save a story?
faq.a7: All generated stories are automatically saved to your library. You can also mark stories as 'Favorites' for quick access.
